data.name: Taru's Infernal Pledge
data.detailed_description:
Story Synopsis

In Taru's Infernal Pledge, you step into the shoes of Taru 'Bolt' Nopsa, a dashing young woman and an exceptionally skilled thief and assassin. Immerse yourself in a new original fantasy universe and the sprawling metropolitan city of Valkama, the capital city of Jaerwik in the northern edges of the known world.

As Taru, you have been working with a gang of criminals, your only family in truth, for a few years now. Your latest mission turns out to be a trap, and you're taken captive by cultists of an ancient evil known as The Fathomless Hunger. Your soul will be sacrificed to appease this mysterious deity, unless you can escape your shackles.

Piru, the 5th archdemon of hell, has been trying to tempt you into a pact with him for a long time. Just like he did with your mother, who died years ago under strange circumstances. Now, in order to escape the cultists, you find yourself finally pledging your body to the demon. Piru's demands, however, make your head spin...

Please the demon's sexual apetites as his concubine and serve him as his assassin. Explore the Abyss with Tryton, the anointed of Astorolus, and become familiar with his intimate world of consensual bdsm. Embrace the blinding and sadistic light of the God of Mercy with Opettaille, and the pleasure that can be found in pain. Find your old gang, answers, and revenge. The road to saving your soul and reclaiming ownership of your body is long and hard.

CONTENT WARNING: This game features some disturbing scenes.

What to expect from the game

Taru's Infernal Pledge is a text-based adventure with digitally hand-drawn backgrounds and lewd art for all sex scenes. It focuses on consensual BDSM throughout the game, while delivering a dark and deep story that delivers shocking revelations of the otherworldly forces acting upon the world. Follow the events of the current timeline where Taru gets into trouble everywhere she goes. Her objectives: Find out who betrayed her and get her revenge, free her soul from the dark force that has claimed it, and free her body from her pledge to the demon, while honoring the terms of her deal. In parallel, follow the flashback events before her current predicament, where she and her gang take on the biggest heist of their careers, and witness the aftermath that saw her world turn upside down. In both the current timeline and the flashbacks, your choices matter and shape the story that unfolds.

Key Features

  • A kinky adventure with a fully developed and complex female protagonist

  • An original epic dark fantasy universe, deep in lore and secrets

  • A branching interactive story with a diverse cast of characters. 20 endings (8 combat 'game over' endings, 7 other 'game over' endings, 5 true endings)

  • An optional combat system, inspired by the classic game "Mastermind" (no luck involved)

  • 13 Chapters, split across over 1450 passages with over 320 000 words (a first play through would typically take 10 - 20 hours)

  • High-quality hand-drawn digital art by multiple artists with unique art styles (Most non-lewd scenes include only a background, while lewd scenes include characters)

Dramatis personae

  • Taru 'Bolt' Nopsa (this is you!) - The main heroine of our story, the 21 year old Taru Nopsa. A criminal, thief and sometimes assassin, who's gotten into a ton of trouble over the years. But nothing compares to the mess she finds herself in at the beginning of our story. Slim in build, pale skin like a typical native of Valkama, with deep green eyes and a long black hair. Taru has never known her father, and so when her mother, Tyrni Nopsa, died, she was taken in by a local gang of ruffians and she's been with them ever since. She goes by the nickname 'Bolt' due to her fast reflexes and quick thinking.

  • Arne 'Eagle' Hanki - The charismatic leader of the gang, Arne is a man who's seen a lot. His daughter Astrid Hanki is also in the gang. Astrid's mother died tragically in child-birth.

  • Ylva 'Fox' Jekku - The second-in-command and mission handler of the gang. Ylva is a tough lady who's a stickler for details.

  • Astrid 'Snowflake' Hanki - The daughter of Arne Hanki, around the same age as Taru. Her father tries to keep her out of trouble as much as possible, never really giving her a chance to show what she's capable of.

  • Ebbe 'Boar' Romu - Truly more boar than man, this hulking mass of flesh couldn't sneak his way out of trouble if his life depended on it. No, his skills lie elsewhere: Bashing skulls in.

  • Einar 'Shadow' Alavire - Perhaps the best at staying unseen and unheard, Einar is a young man the same age as Taru, who joined the gang around the same time as she did. His sister is Erika Alavire.

  • Erika 'Flare' Alavire - The stunningly beautiful and ample-breasted sister of Einar Alavire, just a year younger than Einar. Where she lacks skills of stealth and strength, she makes up for with raw charm and looks.

  • Kerr 'Lurker' Apea - Describing Kerr as a man who sees the glass as half-empty would be an understatement. Nevertheless, his prowess with the blade is unmatched by anyone in the gang. Combine that with a touch for stealth that rivals Einar's and you've got yourself a deadly assassin. Kerr is typically the one who takes care of the dirty work of the gang.

  • Tryton - An ex-priest of The God of Mercy. Now an anointed worshipped of The Fathomless Hunger. He shuns the cult of fanatics sacrificing souls in fear of The Fathomless Hunger. He, instead, seeks to find enlightenment in his lord's wisdom. A prestigious royal advisor.

  • Opettaille - A priest of The God of Mercy, holding the rank of Inquisitor Exarch at the Valkama grand temple.

  • Piru - The Splendor Demon Majesty, the fifth archdemon of hell, Piru is a tall devil with blazing red skin and fiery yellow eyes. Tyrni, Taru's mother, pledged herself to him many years ago.

  • And many more...

Credits

  • Developed and written by: Flimsylegs

  • Music by: Abstraction

  • Art by:

    tacinky, FoxTail19, Cactoratado

    aBigBrother_, Ndzanga, Dadi009,

    Paranoid Incubus, Penguin Star

data.short_description: A devilishly kinky story, in an epic dark medieval fantasy world. Please your demonic master's sexual appetites as his concubine and become his assassin. Explore consensual BDSM with an anointed cultist, embrace the God of Mercy's teachings, and find a way to save your soul from the abyss...

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 1 GHz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2000 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 處理器: Any
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2000 MB 可用空間
